title: Claudia and David
writer: Rose Franken, William Brown Meloney, Vera Caspary
actors: Dorothy McGuire, Robert Young, Mary Astor
plot: The follow-up to the hit film "Claudia" (1943) finds the title character (Dorothy McGuire) and husband David (Robert Young) dealing with the ups and downs of marriage and parenthood in their rural Connecticut town. Illness, accide...
